assertions.title: Reject action terminates chain with reason

steps.action: As VP approver, reject `VAL-APPROVAL-008 planning-approval-advanced` with reason "Budget constraints."
steps.expected: Status becomes Rejected and chain terminates.
steps.observed: Request moved to Rejected; audit captured reject comment; no further step advancement.
Submitter can see rejected status only by opening Approvals; no dedicated notification bell/event was shown.

evidence.network: POST /api/headcount-requests/:id/reject executed; GET /api/orgs/:orgId/headcount-requests confirmed status=rejected with comment "Budget constraints.".

assertions.issues: Rejection flow works, but required submitter notification UX was not observed.

assertions.title: Request changes returns to submitter

steps.action: As VP approver, click Request Changes on `VAL-APPROVAL-009 planning-approval-advanced` with a comment.
steps.expected: Status changes to Changes Requested and returns to submitter for edits.
steps.observed: Status changed to Changes Requested with comment in audit.

steps.action: As manager submitter, attempt to edit and resubmit the request.
steps.expected: Submitter can edit and resubmit, restarting chain from step 1.
steps.observed: Submitter view shows only View/details; no edit+resubmit control was available.

assertions.issues: Resubmit/edit UX for submitter after changes requested is missing.

assertions.title: Notifications for approval events

steps.observed: Finance account showed pending Approvals badge (count increased), indicating next-step visibility.

steps.action: Check submitter notification UI for approval/rejection/changes events.
steps.expected: Submitter receives explicit event notifications with badge updates in real time.
steps.observed: No notification bell/event feed was visible for submitter; status changes were only visible inside Approvals views.

evidence.network: POST /api/headcount-requests/:id/approve advanced the request to finance step; no separate in-app notification endpoint/center surfaced in UI.

assertions.issues: Event-specific notification UX (bell/feed + submitter notifications) was not present.

assertions.title: Bulk approve and reject multiple requests

steps.action: Select 5 pending `BulkApprove-*` requests and click Approve Selected.
steps.observed: All five advanced one step (audit includes approve action; status remained pending at next step).

steps.action: Select 3 pending `BulkReject-*` requests and click Reject Selected with shared reason.
steps.expected: All 3 requests rejected with same reason in audit trail.
steps.observed: All three moved to Rejected; API verification confirmed identical reject comment on each request.

evidence.network: POST /api/headcount-requests/bulk-approve and POST /api/headcount-requests/bulk-reject executed; GET /api/orgs/:orgId/headcount-requests verified 5 advanced + 3 rejected with shared reason.

assertions.title: Full audit trail on completed request

steps.action: Approve `VAL-APPROVAL-010-012 planning-approval-advanced` through VP -> Finance -> CHRO.
steps.expected: Completed request has full chronological trail including actors, actions, comments, and status transitions.
steps.observed: Completed request shows chronological actions with timestamps/comments and approved status.

steps.expected: Trail includes who performed each step and edit history details.
steps.observed: UI trail did not surface actor identity (who) or explicit edit-history entries.

evidence.network: POST /api/headcount-requests/:id/approve executed at VP/Finance/CHRO steps; GET /api/orgs/:orgId/headcount-requests shows audit actions [submit, approve, approve, approve].

assertions.issues: Audit UI is chronological but incomplete versus contract (missing explicit actor identity and edit-history detail).

steps.action: In Org A, select an employee (detail panel open), open Compare view, and set Scenario A1/A2 selectors.
steps.expected: Org A state active with selected employee and compare selectors set.
steps.observed: Selected employee detail panel remained open; Compare selectors set to Org A scenarios.

steps.action: Switch org dropdown from Org A to Org B.
steps.expected: Scenario dropdown reloads Org B scenarios, employee selection clears, compare selectors reset, and employee data updates.
steps.observed: Sidebar scenario dropdown switched to Org B scenarios (B1/B2), Compare selectors reset to Select scenario, detail panel closed, and Org B employee data rendered on Org Chart.

evidence.network: Org switch triggered scenario/employee reload requests and UI state reset (org selector, scenario selector, compare selectors).

frictions.description: agent-browser refs became stale after navigation/dialog submit actions, causing intermittent click timeouts.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran `snapshot -i` before each post-navigation/post-submit interaction and retried with refreshed refs.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-APPROVAL-011, VAL-CROSS-018) and 4 failed (VAL-APPROVAL-008, VAL-APPROVAL-009, VAL-APPROVAL-010, VAL-APPROVAL-012). Primary gaps were notification UX, submitter resubmit flow, and missing actor/edit-history detail in audit UI.
